text: TENTATIVE SCHEDULE FOR B.TECH. ADMISSIONS – ACADEMIC YEAR 2026–27 Event Admission Basis Dates Online Registration Commences S.E.E.E. Phase–I 01/12/2025 Last Date for Registration S.E.E.E. Phase–I 20/04/2026 JEE Counselling Phase–I 10/04/2026 to 16/04/2026 JEE Counselling Phase–II 20/04/2026 to 28/04/2026 S.E.E.E. Examination Phase–I 4, 5, 11, 12, 18, 19, 25 and 26th April, 2026 Result Declaration S.E.E.E. Phase–I 30/04/2026 Counselling S.E.E.E. Phase–I From 4th May 2026 onwards Last Date for Registration S.E.E.E. Phase–II 18/05/2026 S.E.E.E. Examination Phase–II 23rd and 24th May 2026 Result Declaration S.E.E.E. Phase–II 26/05/2026 Counselling S.E.E.E. Phase–II From 30th May 2026 onwards Last Date for Registration APEAPCET 2026 2 days after result declaration Counselling APEAPCET 2026 One week after result declaration Note: 1. Candidates are advised to regularly visit the official website of Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education (Deemed to be University) for detailed instructions, eligibility criteria, fee structure, merit scholarships, and counselling updates. 2. Phase–II counselling will be conducted only to fill the vacant seats remaining after Phase–I. Scholarships will not be guaranteed during Phase–II admissions. 3. Only the leftover seats after counselling through JEE and SEEE will be filled with APEAPCET candidates.
